title: デビュー戦の後に・荒

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's performance certainly impresses the
spectators, but she is thoroughly exhausted
afterward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to her older sister, Biwa Hayahide,
Brian wasn't running like normal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I investigate the data I have on Narita Brian to
find the cause and learn that her experience
racing against multiple opponents is lacking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This discovery could draw attention to her
weakness. We need to overcome it by the Asahi
Hai Futurity Stakes.
